scripts.dev:daemon: BACKEND=$(bash scripts/resolve-backend-dir.sh) && cargo build --manifest-path "$BACKEND/Cargo.toml" -p wenlan-server && (lsof -ti :7878 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; "$BACKEND/target/debug/wenlan-server" &)
scripts.dev:all: pnpm clean:dev && pnpm dev:daemon && pnpm tauri dev
scripts.review:build: pnpm tauri build --debug --bundles app --features review-fixtures --config app/tauri.review.conf.json --no-sign
scripts.review: pnpm review:build && pnpm review:verify && pnpm review:open
scripts.release: pnpm clean:release && pnpm release:daemon && CXXFLAGS='-std=c++17' pnpm tauri build
scripts.release:dmg: rm -f target/release/bundle/macos/rw.*.dmg && mkdir -p target/release/bundle/dmg && node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; const f='target/release/bundle/dmg/Wenlan_'+v+'_aarch64.dmg'; require('fs').rmSync(f,{force:true}); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); execSync('hdiutil create -volname Wenlan -srcfolder target/release/bundle/macos -ov -format UDZO '+f,{stdio:'inherit'}); console.log('Created',f);"
scripts.clean:dev: pkill -9 -f wenlan-server 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f origin-server 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'target/debug/wenlan-app' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'target/debug/origin-app' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'target/debug/origin' 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :7878 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :1420 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; echo 'Dev processes cleaned'
scripts.clean:release: rm -f target/release/bundle/macos/rw.*.dmg; rm -rf target/release/bundle/dmg/Wenlan_*.dmg target/release/bundle/dmg/Origin_*.dmg; echo 'Release artifacts cleaned'
scripts.clean:all: pnpm clean:dev && pnpm clean:release && echo 'All cleaned'
scripts.test:i18n: vitest run src/i18n/locales.test.ts src/i18n/resources.test.ts src/i18n/index.test.ts src/i18n/hardcodedCopyGuard.test.ts
scripts.test:all: pnpm test && cd app && cargo test
scripts.test:coverage:all: pnpm test:coverage && cd app && cargo llvm-cov --html
